blocks.content: This is a config-driven single-page application. All content lives in config.json — no HTML changes needed to add or edit pages.
This site is built with a config-driven CMS pattern. The frontend fetches a single JSON file at startup and renders pages from it using a block-based render engine.
Get in touch using the form below.
